title: 10th Pass Jobs 2026 – Fleet Personnel & Trainees
shortInfo: DCI Recruitment 2026 aims to fill 45 vacancies for Fleet Personnel & Trainees posts. Eligible candidates with B.Tech/B.E, 10TH can apply online on or before 17-06-2026 through the official DCI website, dredge-india.com.

basic_details.job_title: Dredging Corporation of India (DCI) Recruitment 2026, Notification Out for Fleet Personnel & Trainees, Walk-In Interview on 23rd June
basic_details.short_information: DCI Recruitment 2026 aims to fill 45 vacancies for Fleet Personnel & Trainees posts. Eligible candidates with B.Tech/B.E, 10TH can apply online on or before 17-06-2026 through the official DCI website, dredge-india.com.

qualification.details: Candidates must have completed a 4-year Degree in Marine Engineering from any IMU-affiliated college / DG Shipping approved institute / State or Central Government recognised institute / AICTE-approved institute. Candidates holding a Graduate Marine Engineering certificate after completing a 4-year Engineering Degree are also eligible. Candidates who already hold or are about to obtain MEO Class IV COC are not eligible for TME.

how_to_apply: Visit the official DCI website at https://www.dredge-india.com/career.
Download the prescribed Bio-Data format available on the career page.
Fill in the Bio-Data form completely - include post applied for, date of birth, qualifications, CDC/Passport/INDOS details, and full experience history.
Attach self-attested photocopies of all required certificates (COC, CDC, Passport, INDOS, STCW 2010, Mark Sheets, Caste Certificate as applicable).
Send the soft copy of your Bio-Data and all documents to recruitfs@dcil.co.in on or before 17th June 2026 by 15:00 hours.

Senior fleet ranks unable to attend in person (Dredge Master, Chief Officer, Chief Engineer Officer, 2nd Engineer Officer) - mention "Request for attending Interview through VC Mode" in the subject line of your email.
Appear at the walk-in interview venue with original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies on the scheduled date.
Candidates currently on board (internal floating staff) who cannot sign off must attend via VC mode with the recommendation of the Master concerned.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for DCI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to send soft copy of Bio-Data and documents to recruitfs@dcil.co.in is 17th June 2026 by 15:00 hours. Applications received after this deadline will not be considered.

faq.question: When is the DCI Recruitment 2026 Walk-In Interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews are scheduled on 23rd June 2026 (Fleet Personnel & Trainees ERR/SHM/Cook), 24th June 2026 (TME & TELO), and 25th June 2026 (NCV(T)) — all from 10:00 AM at Dredge House, Visakhapatnam.

faq.question: How many vacancies are there in DCI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 45 confirmed trainee vacancies — 15 each for TME, TELO, and NCV(T). Fleet Personnel vacancies are based on operational requirements and are not fixed.

faq.question: What is the stipend for Trainee Marine Engineer in DCI 2026?
faq.answer: Trainee Marine Engineers will receive a stipend of Rs. 25,000/- per month plus Rs. 600/- victualing allowance per day during the training period.

faq.question: Can I attend the DCI interview via video call (VC Mode)?
faq.answer: Yes. Senior fleet ranks — Dredge Master, Inland Master, Chief Officer, 2nd Officer, Chief Engineer Officer, and 2nd Engineer Officer — who are unable to attend in person can request a VC Mode interview by mentioning it in the subject line of their email to recruitfs@dcil.co.in before 17th June 2026.

faq.question: What is the age limit for NCV Trainee in DCI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for NCV Trainee (NCV(T)) must be less than 25 years of age as on the date of joining onboard.

faq.question: Is DCI Recruitment 2026 a permanent job?
faq.answer: No. All vacancies under DCI Recruitment 2026 both fleet personnel and trainees are of a purely temporary contractual nature and do not confer any right to permanent or regular employment.

faq.question: What is the minimum qualifying score for Fleet Personnel selection?
faq.answer: The minimum qualifying score for Fleet Personnel selection through interview is 50 marks out of 100.

faq.question: Do I need to apply online for DCI Walk-In Interview 2026?
faq.answer: No. Candidates attending the walk-in interview under Advertisement No. 02/2026 need not apply online. Simply carry the prescribed Bio-Data form along with original and self-attested copies of all documents.

faq.question: Where is the DCI Walk-In Interview 2026 venue?
faq.answer: The interview will be held at DCIL, Dredge House, H.B. Colony, Seethammadhara, Visakhapatnam – 530022, Andhra Pradesh.

seo_tags: Dredging Corporation of India Fleet Personnel & Trainees Recruitment 2026
